svg:
<svg id="002-info-flow" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="信息化处理流程" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">信息化处理流程</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="124" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="92" y="143" text-anchor="middle">现实问题</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 162 137 H 166"/><rect class="box" x="174" y="105" width="124" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="236" y="143" text-anchor="middle">抽象数据</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 306 137 H 310"/><rect class="box" x="318" y="105" width="124" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="380" y="143" text-anchor="middle">选择结构</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 450 137 H 454"/><rect class="box" x="462" y="105" width="124" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="524" y="143" text-anchor="middle">算法处理</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 594 137 H 598"/><rect class="box" x="606" y="105" width="124" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="668" y="143" text-anchor="middle">产生价值</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>

<svg id="002-real-world-model" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="现实场景的数据抽象" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">现实场景的数据抽象</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">金钱/排队/关注</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">数值变量</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">线性序列</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">图状关系</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">数据抽象</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">float/int</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">数组/队列</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">用户关系图</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="002-course-map" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="基础课程关系图" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">基础课程关系图</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">编程工具</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">C 语言</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">数据结构</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">算法</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">专业基础</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">组成原理</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">操作系统</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">计算机网络</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="002-efficiency" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="表示与效率" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">表示与效率</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">能表示</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">数组也能排队</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">手动移动元素</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">能跑</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">更高效</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">队列/链表</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">操作更贴合</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">更省成本</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>
